$comment: ADR 0017 — bindgen lockfile. Pins the provenance + content hash of the generated FFI surface so CI (bindgen.yml / bindgen.test.ts) fails on any drift between the spec and the three emitted sites. For this first slice the spec is hand-authored (compiler/bindgen/src/spec.ts), so the lock pins the spec source + the toolchain rather than upstream package versions; the real @webref/idl + webidl2 pins arrive with the WebIDL adapter.

toolchain.note: webidl2 / @webref/idl are NOT yet a dependency — the Math/clock slice is a hand-authored Tier-0 table (ADR 0017 first milestone).
